message:
fix(search): force LIKE fallback for agent/project searches (br-29eye)

Identity FTS tables (fts_agents, fts_projects) are dropped at runtime by
enforce_runtime_identity_fts_cleanup to prevent rowid/index corruption.
The search planner was still generating FTS5 MATCH queries against these
tables, causing agent_search_quality and project_search_quality tests to
fail with "no such table" errors.

Fix: plan_agent_search and plan_project_search now always use
PlanMethod::Like, bypassing the dead FTS path entirely. This aligns the
planner with the runtime invariant established by the cleanup system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
